environment_type: Secondary/Transit setting; expansive urban gathering place.
visual_summary: An expansive, open-air urban expanse characterized by alien architecture and a dusty Martian atmosphere. The plaza serves as a large-scale gathering place anchored by surrounding buildings and is populated by observing crowds and groups of Martian warriors.
layout_notes: Expansive scale; functions as a transition point from enclosed chambers to the wider cityscape.
constraints: Must maintain transition from enclosed spaces to wide cityscape.
Scale must remain expansive and urban.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific architectural style or materials of the alien buildings are not defined.
Exact spatial relationship between the plaza and the "enclosed chamber" mentioned in lighting notes is unquantified.
evidence_summary: Environment currently kept under extracted canonical id.
Lighting: Open-air Martian atmosphere; transition from the enclosed chamber to the wider cityscape; populated by observing crowds and warriors.
Atmosphere: Open-air Martian atmosphere; transition from the enclosed chamber to the wider cityscape; populated by observing crowds and warriors.
Scale: Expansive urban scale; anchored by surrounding buildings and the presence of groups of Martian warriors.
